Gender dysphoria is rough. Being told that I'm pretty doesn't hurt, it maybe helps a little sometimes, but largely.. I don't believe you. I can't believe you. It isn't a choice. 

I often choose to lie to myself and hope that convinces me, but ultimately I don't believe those things about myself.
